findings.title: Excessive repeated file reads
findings.recommendation: Prefer targeted searches and summarize file state before rereading the same files.

findings.title: Retry-loop behavior

evidence.description: Maximum retry depth across analyzed sessions

findings.recommendation: Stop after repeated failures, inspect the invariant, and restart with a smaller debugging scope.

findings.title: Context growth spikes

evidence.description: Timeline windows exceeded growth threshold across analyzed sessions

findings.recommendation: Compact after task pivots and avoid combining architecture, debugging, and implementation in one long session.

immediate_fixes: Prefer targeted searches and summarize file state before rereading the same files.
Stop after repeated failures, inspect the invariant, and restart with a smaller debugging scope.
Compact after task pivots and avoid combining architecture, debugging, and implementation in one long session.
